Tests if `Object.prototype.toLocaleString` is a function.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks if the `toLocaleString` method exists on `Object.prototype` and is of type `function`. It serves as a validation step to ensure that the JavaScript environment supports the `toLocaleString` method, which is used to convert an object to a string that is locale-sensitive. This is a narrow functionality check, likely used in a testing or initialization context to confirm compatibility or availability of this method in the runtime environment.
